findings.evidence_span: if filename.endswith((".png", ".jpg")): saves file bytes without MIME, magic-byte, or size validation
findings.recommended_fix: Validate MIME type, file signature, size, and extension together before storage; reject mismatches.

findings.evidence_span: save(str(UPLOAD_ROOT / filename), file_bytes) with UPLOAD_ROOT=/public/uploads joins a user filename into a public path
findings.recommended_fix: Generate server-side object names, normalize paths, enforce a storage root, and store uploads outside executable public directories.

findings.evidence_span: config.yaml has audit_log_retention_days empty and upload/download handlers do not write audit events
findings.recommended_fix: Record actor, object id, action, result, timestamp, and configure audit retention/export.
